ContentsTabSwitchView.Title: Switch View
ContentsTabSwitchView.ShortHelp: Switches between tile and grid view.
ContentsTabSwitchView.LongHelp: The icon shows the current view. To change the view, click the displayed icon and select the required view.
ContentTabAddContent.Title: Add Existing
ContentTabAddContent.ShortHelp: Search for additional content to add to the route. You can only add content that you have read permission to.
ContentTabRemoveContent.Title: Remove
InformationPanelRelationsTabRelations.Sh: The Relations tab displays the related objects of the selected object
MembersTabSwitchView.Title: Switch View
MembersTabSwitchView.ShortHelp: Switches between tile and grid view.
RouteContextualMenuCopyLink.Title: Copy Link
RouteContextualMenuCopyLink.ShortHelp: Copies the path of the route. Click the link or copy and paste link in the browser to open the context route.
RouteContextualMenuOpen.Title: Open
RouteContextualMenuOpen.ShortHelp: Opens the route showing the Tasks, Content, and Members tabs. You can also double-click in any row or tile to open the route.
RouteContextualMenuRestart.Title: Restart
RouteContextualMenuRestart.ShortHelp: Restarts a route from the first task if a Task was rejected or the route was stopped. Only shows for routes that have a status of Stopped.
RouteContextualMenuResume.Title: Resume
RouteContextualMenuResume.ShortHelp: Resumes a route that had been stopped by the route owner.
RouteContextualMenuRevision.Title: Revisions
RouteContextualMenuRevision.ShortHelp: Shows a revision of the route.
RouteContextualMenuStart.Title: Start
RouteContextualMenuStart.ShortHelp: Starts the route by creating and assigning the first order tasks.
RouteContextualMenuStart.LongHelp: Only shows for a route that has not been started, or that was stopped.
RouteContextualMenuStop.Title: Stop
RouteContextualMenuStop.ShortHelp: Stops a route, which is in process.
RouteContextualMenuStop.LongHelp: You can also add comments and choose to demote the connected object while stopping a route.
RouteSummaryAddNewRoute.Title: New Route
RouteSummaryAddNewRoute.ShortHelp: Lets you create a route from this template.
RouteSummaryAddNewTemplate.Title: New template
RouteSummaryAddNewTemplate.ShortHelp: Lets you create a route from this template.
RouteSummaryAddNewTemplate.LongHelp: This command is shown only when the route template is in the Released state. Opens the New Route panel with this template selected in the Template field.
RouteSummaryPageChangeOwner.Title: Change Owner
RouteSummaryPageChangeOwner.ShortHelp: Changes the existing owner of the route.
RouteSummaryPageDelete.Title: Delete
RouteSummaryPageDelete.LongHelp: Only a user with the Owner or Administrator responsibilities can delete routes created for an object.
RouteSummaryPageFilter.Title: Filter by
RouteSummaryPageSwitchView.Title: Switch View
RouteSummaryPageSwitchView.ShortHelp: Switches between tile and grid view.
RouteViewContentTabContentContextualMenu: Downloads the file to your computer. Only shows if the content includes a file.
Lets you open the object in other compatible apps.
RouteViewContextualMenuSaveAsTemplate.Sh: Creates a template from this route
SummaryPageInformation.Title: Information
SummaryPageInformation.ShortHelp: Shows the information panel, which shows the information of the Route.
TaskTabAddTask.Title: Add Task
TaskTabAddTask.ShortHelp: Opens the properties page of a route task to add the details and save the task.
TaskTabEdit.Title: Edit mode
TaskTabEdit.ShortHelp: Lets you edit existing tasks, delete tasks, or add additional tasks.
TaskTabSelectUserFromUsergroup.Title: Select User from Usergroup
TaskTabSelectUserFromUsergroup.ShortHelp: Selects a specific user from the user group and assign it to the route task.
TaskTabSwitchView.Title: Switch View
TaskTabSwitchView.ShortHelp: Switches between tile and grid view.
Changes the person responsible for completing the task.
TaskTabTaskContextualMenuDelete.Title: Delete
TaskTabTaskContextualMenuDelete.ShortHel: Deletes the task. Only available in edit mode.
TaskTabTaskContextualMenuOpen.Title: Open
TemplateContextualMenuRequestTemplateRel: Promotes the route template to the Released state
TemplateSummaryFilter.Title: Filter By
TemplateSummaryFilter.ShortHelp: Flters the list of route templates.
TemplateSummaryPageChangeOwner.Title: Change Owner
TemplateSummaryPageChangeOwner.ShortHelp: Changes the existing owner of the route template.
TemplateSummaryPageDelete.Title: Delete
TemplateSummaryPageDelete.LongHelp: The template must be In the Draft maturity state and is not linked to another route template.
TemplateSummaryPageSwitchView.Title: Switch View
TemplateSummaryPageSwitchView.ShortHelp: Switches between tile and grid view.
TemplateSummaryTemplateContextualMenuNew: Lets you create a route from this template.
This command is shown only when the route template is in the Released state. Opens the New Route panel with this template selected in the Template field.
WelcomePanelNewRoute.Title: New Route
WelcomePanelNewRoute.ShortHelp: Create routes that define a series of tasks that need to be completed.
WelcomePanelNewTemplate.Title: New Templates
WelcomePanelNewTemplate.ShortHelp: Creates route templates so that when a user creates a route based on the template, the route tasks, assignees, and other details are already defined.
WelcomePanelRoutes.Title: Routes
WelcomePanelRoutes.ShortHelp: Lists routes that you have access to, and lets you create new routes.
WelcomePanelTemplates.Title: Templates
WelcomePanelTemplates.ShortHelp: Lists route templates, create new templates, and revise existing templates.
TaskContextualMenuCopyLink.Title: Copy Link
TaskContextualMenuCopyLink.ShortHelp: Copies the path of the Inbox Task. Click the link or copy and paste link in the browser to open the context Inbox Task.
TemplateContextualMenuCopyLink.Title: Copy Link
TemplateContextualMenuCopyLink.ShortHelp: Copies the path of the template. Click the link or copy and paste link in the browser to open the context template.
ContentContextualMenuCopyLink.Title: Copy Link
ContentContextualMenuCopyLink.ShortHelp: Copies the path of the content. Click the link or copy and paste link in the browser to open the context content.
TemplateContextualMenuRevision.Title: Revisions
TemplateContextualMenuRevision.ShortHelp: Shows a revision of the route template.
TemplateContextualMenuReleaseTemplate.Sh: Promotes the route template to the Released state
TemplateContextualMenuSetToArchived.Shor: Promotes the route template to the Archived state
TemplateContextualMenuSetToDraft.Title: Set to Draft
TemplateContextualMenuSetToDraft.ShortHe: Demotes the route template to the Draft state
TemplateContextualMenuOpen.Title: Open
TemplateContextualMenuOpen.ShortHelp: Opens the route template showing the Tasks, Members, and Applies To tabs. You can also double-click in any row or tile to open the route template.
TaskTabTaskContextualMenuCreateNewSubrou: Creates a sub route from the context task. Only the assignee of the task can create a sub route.
TaskTabTaskContextualApprovalProcessForS: Opens the list of sub routes and shows the title of the context task from which the sub route is created.
TaskTabTaskContextualAssignToSelf.Title: Assign to Self
TaskTabTaskContextualAssignToSelf.ShortH: Sets yourself as the assignee for a task assigned to a user group.
TaskTabTaskContextualMarkAsComplete.Long: The route owner can mark the selected task as completed. This option is used to complete tasks that are in the Assigned state. Once the task is completed, the approval status of the task is displayed as Completed by Owner.
TaskTabTaskContextualSelectAssignee.Shor: Search for the required person and add to the route.
TaskTabTaskContextualSelectAssignee.Long: If the route template is also defined a user group for the task, you can only select an assignee from people in that user group.
RouteViewContentTabContentContextualMenu: Blocks the maturity state promotion for the object.
Shows the target maturity state of the content.
Opens the maturity graph from where you can change the maturity state of the content.
ContentsTabUpload.Title: Upload
ContentsTabUpload.ShortHelp: Uploads the files as content to a route.
TemplateContextualMenuNewRevision.Title: New Revision
TemplateContextualMenuNewRevision.ShortH: Creates a revision of the selected route template.
MemberContextualMenuRead.Title: Can Read
MemberContextualMenuRead.ShortHelp: Allow route members to view route properties and download route content.
MemberContextualMenuEdit.Title: Can Edit
MemberContextualMenuEdit.ShortHelp: Allow route members to view and edit the route and its content.
MemberContextualMenuRemoveContent.Title: Can Remove Content
MemberContextualMenuRemoveContent.ShortH: Allow route members to remove content from route and edit its content.
MemberContextualMenuAddNewContent.Title: Can Add New Content
MemberContextualMenuAddNewContent.ShortH: Allow route members to add new content to the route and edit its content.
MemberContextualMenuAddRemoveContent.Sho: Allow route members to add and remove content from route and edit its content.
TemplateSummaryInformation.Title: Information
TemplateSummaryInformation.ShortHelp: Shows the information panel, which shows the information of the Route Template.
ContentInformationIcon.Title: Information
ContentInformationIcon.ShortHelp: Shows the information panel, which shows the information of the Content.
